title: Secrets Management with HashiCorp Vault
author: Casey Anderson
Security Engineer
description: Centralize secrets management with Vault—but key rotation breaks services
content:
Vault provides centralized secrets storage, dynamic credential generation, and encryption as a service.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Vault Breach (2038)](/docs/articles/vault-breach-2038)
